channel.title: GitHub GLSL Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of GLSL in GitHub

item.title: patriciogonzalezvivo/thebookofshaders
item.description: Step-by-step guide through the abstract and complex universe of Fragment Shaders.

item.title: Open4Es/Open4Es-Shader-Android
item.description: This is a shader can running on Minecraft Java Edition For Phone project which uses GL4ES. This repository contains source code for Android platform.

item.title: KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross
item.description: SPIRV-Cross is a practical tool and library for performing reflection on SPIR-V and disassembling SPIR-V back to high level languages.

item.title: gdquest-demos/godot-shaders
item.description: A large library of free and open-source shaders for the Godot game engine. Here, you'll get 2D and 3D shaders with playable demos.

item.title: SaschaWillems/Vulkan
item.description: C++ examples for the Vulkan graphics API

item.title: X0nk/Bliss-Shader
item.description: A minecraft shader which is an edit of chocapic v9
